articles.title: Israeli parliament approves 2026 state budget, spokesperson says - Reuters
articles.snippet: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Israel's far-right National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir shake hands as they attend a session at the Knesset, Israeli parliament, in Jerusalem March 29, 2026 REUTERS/Oren Ben Hakoon Purchase Licensing Rights, opens new tab. March 30 (Reuters) - Isra
